name: Boundary Gold and Copper Mining Ltd.
summary: Boundary Gold and Copper Mining Ltd. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mining properties in Canada and Mexico. The company focuses on exploring gold, silver, and copper deposits. It holds 100% option agreement Kena Project located in the British Colombia, Canada; Daylight Property comprising 1,550 hectares located in the British Columbia, Canada; and Toughnut Property, which covers an area of 1,010 hectares located in the British Columbia, Canada. The company was formerly known as Prize Mining Corporation and changed its name to Boundary Gold and Copper Mining Ltd. in October 2019. Boundary Gold and Copper Mining Ltd. was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
